detail.description:
Summon over 800 legendary heroes from 16 factions to battle bosses like fearsome dragons and colossal demons. Explore dungeons, enjoy turn-based multiplayer action, and master tactics to free Teleria in this epic role-playing game!

Tactical battles await in this turn-based dark fantasy role-playing game, where you can summon hundreds of Champions from 16 playable factions.

Fight the forces of the dark lord Siroth with your legendary band of immortal warriors. Train them for battle, craft the p
detail.recentChanges:
New in 11.51.0:

FEATURES:
- Added Auto-Equip button: equips your Champions with recommended Gear.
- Oil Mixer: combine Oils into Chaos Dust & Chaos Powder.
- Added Background Auto-Climb in the Doom Tower.
- Added new Gear filters.
- Treasure Tickets: exchange Plarium Points for rewards. Check the Forum & Release News for more details.
- Telerian Homecoming: new reactivation program for those returning to Teleria.
- Added ability to craft up to 10 Relics at a time.
- Champion rebalance.
